mapper.select: select (select count(1) from t_elder) elderCount, (select count(distinct elder_id) from t_reminder_task where task_type = 'MEDICATION' and status = 'DONE') regularMedicationCount, (select count(1) from t_health_data where date(record_time) = curdate()) healthRecordTodayCount, ( (select count(1) from t_camera_device where status = 'ONLINE') + (select count(1) from t_voice_terminal where status = 'ONLINE') + (select count(1) from t_edge_gateway where status = 'ONLINE') ) onlineDeviceCount, ( (select count(1) from t_fall_record where date(fall_time) = curdate()) + (select count(1) from t_health_data hd left join t_health_data_threshold hdt on hdt.id = 1 where date(hd.record_time) = curdate() and ( (hdt.blood_glucose_high is not null and hd.blood_glucose > hdt.blood_glucose_high) or (hdt.blood_glucose_low is not null and hd.blood_glucose < hdt.blood_glucose_low) or (hdt.heart_rate_high is not null and hd.heart_rate > hdt.heart_rate_high) or (hdt.heart_rate_low is not null and hd.heart_rate < hdt.heart_rate_low) or (hdt.spo2 is not null and hd.spo2 < hdt.spo2) or (hdt.temperature_high is not null and hd.temperature > hdt.temperature_high) or (hdt.temperature_low is not null and hd.temperature < hdt.temperature_low) or ( hd.blood_pressure is not null and instr(hd.blood_pressure, '/') > 0 and ( (hdt.blood_pressure_high is not null and cast(substring_index(hd.blood_pressure, '/', 1) as decimal(8,2)) > hdt.blood_pressure_high) or (hdt.blood_pressure_low is not null and cast(substring_index(hd.blood_pressure, '/', -1) as decimal(8,2)) < hdt.blood_pressure_low) ) ) )) ) alertTodayCount, (select count(1) from t_reminder_task where task_type = 'MEDICATION' and date(remind_time) = curdate() and status = 'PENDING') medicationPendingTodayCount

select date_format(d.stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') statDate, date_format(d.stat_date, '%m/%d') dateLabel, case date_format(d.stat_date, '%w') when '0' then '周日' when '1' then '周一' when '2' then '周二' when '3' then '周三' when '4' then '周四' when '5' then '周五' else '周六' end dayName, count(rt.id) expectedCount, sum(case when rt.status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) completedCount, case when d.stat_date = curdate() then true else false end currentDay from ( select date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) stat_date union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 5 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 4 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 3 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 2 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) union all select curdate() ) d left join t_reminder_task rt on date(rt.remind_time) = d.stat_date and rt.task_type = 'MEDICATION' group by d.stat_date order by d.stat_date asc
